description: Built an internal MLOps platform using FastAPI for 15+ data scientists to train & deploy ML models.
Supported 35+ production models monthly with 99.5% deployment success rate on Databricks & AKS.
Automated model packaging & container deployment, cutting deploy time from 3 days to 30 minutes.
Reduced infrastructure costs by 35% through smart container sharing across Kubernetes clusters.
Integrated 5 security scanners (Coverity, ModelScan, TwistLock, Malware, BDH) into CI/CD pipeline.
Caught 40+ critical vulnerabilities pre-deployment, achieving SOC2 compliance standards.
Built and deployed large-scale data pipelines using PySpark and Databricks to process 500K+ service tickets and 10K+ PDF documents weekly, powering AI chatbot for 10+ enterprise customers.
Created automated PDF parsing system using PySpark and PyMuPDF to extract data from technical manuals and schematics with 95% accuracy, eliminating manual data entry.
Developed real-time data ingestion system leveraging change data capture (CDC), reducing data update latency from 24 hours to under 15 minutes for critical service tickets.
Improved data pipeline efficiency by 70% with automated quality checks and schema validation, cutting ML team's development time from weeks to days.
